title: oplismenus pseudocolonus
intro: Oplismenus pseudocolonus, also known as false false-brome, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Oplismenus pseudocolonus include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and infusing the leaves or roots in hot water to create a tea or decoction for medicinal use.
